news.title: UNI student helps preserve hidden Grant Wood history for upcoming documentary
news.summary_en: Not many college students get the chance to work with a historic piece of art created by an internationally-renowned artist – but for University of Northern Iowa student Anissa Droessler, that rare opportunity became a reality. Droessler, a UNI Art Education major, recently contributed to a documentary project centered on Grant Wood’s World War I memorial windows, located in the Cedar Rapids Veter

news.title: UNI faculty members build connections on the basketball court
news.summary_en: At University of Northern Iowa, some of the most meaningful lessons in connection, mentorship and belonging don’t just happen in the classroom — they happen on the basketball court.

news.title: UNI announces 2026 Homecoming theme “The Future is Purple”
news.summary_en: Panthers near and far will gather in Cedar Falls this October to celebrate “The Future is Purple” for the University of Northern Iowa Homecoming.

news.title: UNI celebrates completed nursing facility for BSN programs
news.summary_en: The University of Northern Iowa is celebrating its newly completed nursing facility, giving students access to advanced, hands-on training designed to mirror real-world clinical environments.

news.title: Dates announced for free Gallagher Bluedorn Block Party series
news.summary_en: The Gallagher Bluedorn Performing Arts Center has announced the 2026 schedule for its free summer Block Party series, with the University of Northern Iowa Sesquicentennial Celebration as the platinum sponsor of the series.
